title: Edge Layer Contract Outputs (Global — no region in state key)
description: Edge is a SEPARATE lifecycle from edge-identity. Edge manages global resources: CloudFront (frontend only), Route53, WAF (CLOUDFRONT scope), ACM (us-east-1 for CloudFront). API traffic routes through Route53 failover to regional API Gateway, NOT through CloudFront.

acm_certificate_arn.description: ACM cert in us-east-1 for CloudFront

api_failover_record_name.description: Route53 failover record for API traffic

frontend_origin_path.description: Current active frontend release prefix in S3
